notes: Host numbers are a lower bound on the target MCU; Cortex-M4 @ 168 MHz is typically 10-20x slower on pure-C integer code.
max_us captures first-iteration outliers (branch-predictor warmup, instruction-cache misses). The mean and min are what matter.

Budgets from docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-17-track1-ax25-design.md §4.11: encode < 5000 us, decode < 2000 us per frame @ 168 MHz. All cases clear the budget with multi-order-of-magnitude margin on the host and a healthy margin projected on target.
